title: genesis-mssc — P49: Multi-Scale Somatic Coherence (MSSC) + Temporal Integrity Probe (TIP) — exploratory GenesisAeon research module
description:
Exploratory research module — Pre-Alpha. Results are not ready for clinical or policy use.

genesis-mssc bundles two submodules: MSSC (Multi-Scale Somatic Coherence Framework) for cross-scale EEG–HRV coupling analysis on PhysioNet datasets (CAP Sleep DB, SHHS), and TIP (Temporal Integrity Probe), a context-manipulation harness for measuring text-behaviour consistency in AI agents under temporal perturbation.

MSSC will qualify as GenesisAeon domain 18 only when its CREP integration gate reaches passed status (three-state enum: blocked → pending_review → passed; four simultaneous conditions: significance, null-exclusion, stable β-fit, independent replication) — currently blocked. TIP is a future P50 candidate once it produces Γ_somatic via a full Diamond Interface.

Open falsifiable hypothesis: TIP consistency scores are predicted to rank-correlate with Ρ_sem (scope-resilience, P41) — making TIP the first behavioural, externally-observable test of the Ρ_sem hallucination-resilience framework. This is a testable prediction, not a confirmed result.

Part of the GenesisAeon genesis-os ecosystem (P49, domain: somatic coherence / temporal integrity). See github.com/GenesisAeon/multi-scale-somatic-coherence for source and documentation.
